---
title: "About"
---

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
<<<<<<< Updated upstream
![Replace this placeholder with an image of yourself, your project, or something relevant to the site.](./images/coker_ML_indoorPM25.jpeg){.profile-image}
=======
![Environmental Health data science is integral to my projects' success. I align and integrate disparate datasets across different time and spatial scales to formulate powerfull analyses that enable interdisciplinary and impactful research. ](./images/coker_ML_indoorPM25.jpeg){.profile-image}
>>>>>>> Stashed changes
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-8}
## About me or this project

Replace this text with a short biography or project description. A useful introduction usually answers:

- Who are you, or what is this project?
- What work or topics do you focus on?
- Who is this website for?
- What should visitors explore next?

## Skills or areas of interest

- Add an area of expertise
- Add a tool, method, or topic
- Add another interest

## Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/YOUR-USERNAME)
- [Organization or professional profile](https://example.org)
- [Email or contact page](https://example.org/contact)
:::
:::
